description_long: This bonsai features a tall, slender trunk with a dark brown, almost black, coloration and a faceted, low-poly appearance. The trunk rises from a broad, angular base with several pronounced root-like extensions, giving it a sturdy stance. Sparse, angular branches jut out at irregular intervals, each adorned with a few large, stylized white blossoms and scattered petals, evoking a minimalist cherry blossom aesthetic. The foliage is minimal, with the white flowers providing the primary visual contrast against the dark trunk. The overall form is vertical and dramatic, with a sense of upward movement and dynamic branching. There is no visible pot, and the base appears integrated with the trunk, suggesting a stylized or abstract representation.
description: A tall, dark-barked bonsai with sparse, angular branches and large white blossoms, featuring a dramatic, minimalist silhouette. The base is broad and faceted, with root-like extensions and no visible pot.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with its trunk slightly angled, showing several white blossoms and petals on the left side, and prominent root extensions at the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the right-side branches, with more blossoms visible and the angular base extending outward, emphasizing the tree's verticality.
description_view_2: The front of the bonsai displays the tallest trunk section, with blossoms at different heights and a clear view of the faceted base and root extensions.
description_view_3: The bonsai is shown with branches and blossoms more evenly distributed, and the base's angular extensions are visible on both sides.
attribute_pot_type: No visible pot; the base is integrated with the trunk and has a faceted, angular form resembling stylized roots.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is mostly straight with subtle, angular bends, resembling an informal upright style with a dramatic, vertical emphasis.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are sparse and irregularly spaced, jutting out at sharp angles with a minimalist, radial pattern.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is very sparse, with only a few large blossoms and scattered petals, giving an open and minimalist impression.
